notes:
The Game on itself runs actually pretty well. The Performance isn't that good but yeah... it's at least playable and after a while i got used to it anyways.
You aren't able to play the Game for over 30 Minutes though, since you get disconnected of the Defiance Game Servers.
title: Defiance

notes: To fix the connection networking error: cd ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.2/dist/lib/ (replace Proton 4.2 with your Proton version!), ln -s /usr/lib32/libgnutls.so.30.14.11 libgnutls.so.26, ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.2/dist/lib64/ (replace Proton 4.2 with your Proton version!), ln -s /usr/lib32/libgnutls.so.30.14.11 libgnutls.so.26
title: Defiance

notes: Gets connectivity issues, game unplayable, just creates character
title: Defiance
